segments.text: Looking to land! Mashing out with side B—spacing it solid so they can't even shield the landing attempt, but...
segments.original_text: 着地をしたいなるほど暴れる横Bしっかりと着地に対してガードもできない横B置いていたんですが

segments.text: Oh! What about from this position? Deliberately side B into back air! That's composed!
segments.original_text: おっとこれはどうだこの位置よりあえて横Bそして空中後ろ冷静です

full_text: Looking to land! Mashing out with side B—spacing it solid so they can't even shield the landing attempt, but... Oh! What about from this position? Deliberately side B into back air! That's composed!
